config.KelSprite.name: Kel's Sprite
config.KelSprite.description: Choose the style of sprite Kel uses.
NonbinaryKel.51: speak Leah "We had an apartment together, back in the city.$u#$b#I did odd jobs during the day and spent all night working on art projects... we barely made enough to scrape by.$u#$b#They were always nagging me to go back to school and study business or medicine... something with a lot of money in it.$a#$b#I guess the idea was to save up for a normal life. You know... a house in the suburbs, kids, PTA meetings... that sort of thing.$u"
NonbinaryKel.584059: speak Leah "Hmm... There's this 'Dr. K' that keeps buying all my sculptures.$7#$b#I guess it must be some rich doctor who loves my stuff."
NonbinaryKel.punch: speak Leah "Well, they'll make it... but that was pretty violent, @."
NonbinaryKel.choseInternet1: message "KEL: I found your online art store... weren't you wondering about the 'Dr. K' who kept buying all your sculptures?"
NonbinaryKel.choseInternet2: speak Leah "You're 'Dr. K'? I... I thought it was just a rich doctor who truly loved my art.$s"
NonbinaryKel.noPunch: speak Leah "@'s a better person than you in every respect!$a#$b#Now get out of here and never come back!$a"
